build.beforeDevCommand: node scripts/prepare-frontend.mjs && node scripts/prepare-resources.mjs && node scripts/prepare-node.mjs
build.beforeBuildCommand: node scripts/prepare-frontend.mjs && node scripts/prepare-resources.mjs && node scripts/prepare-node.mjs

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://api.github.com
